## Source: amazon-inspector (47cb6abcb11f6d62fb52ef331d93bf4c2d5faacb9a4f91386aa6fb06e03b7bef)
The package apollo-landing was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9589bced4a1e0899f6503ecf69fdd88ee5bfef79c53e2ecb9ef6e525d72eef7d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'apollo-landing' @ 1.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
